title: Feature list screen
description: Second tab renders every feature with id, title, status, and a coloured status pill. Read-only.
verification: Tab reachable from the bottom tab bar
All features in the features/ directory appear
Status pill colours: todo=grey, in_progress=blue, blocked=red, done=green
RTL renders correctly (toggle device language to Arabic)
Render test covers the rendered list
notes: Use FlatList or FlashList — never .map over a long array of Views. Originally id `ui-002`.
